category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Georgia, covering GNCC type approval/notification and GEOSTM (GS standards) conformity requirements under Georgia's Electronic Communications Law and EU-aligned regulatory framework.

title.en: China-to-Georgia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (GNCC / GEOSTM)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入格鲁吉亚：GNCC / GEOSTM合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入喬治亞：GNCC / GEOSTM合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Georgia requirements under GNCC (Georgian National Communications Commission — the national telecom regulatory authority) and GEOSTM (Georgian Standards and Metrology Institute), covering GNCC type approval and conformity certification under the Electronic Communications Law of Georgia, GEOSTM (GS) standard conformity for radio equipment and electromagnetic compatibility, electrical safety for the 220 V/50 Hz European-plug (Type C/F) grid, local importer and authorised distributor requirements, and Georgia cybersecurity obligations under the Georgia Cybersecurity Law (2012) and CERT.GOV.GE. Georgia has an EU Association Agreement (DCFTA, in force 2016) driving regulatory convergence with EU RED and EN/ETSI standards; however, GNCC type approval remains a separate national process and GNCC conformity certificates are required in addition to any EU-standard test reports. Georgia is not a member of the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU). Chinese CCC, SRRC, and CE documentation are not recognised as substitutes for GNCC approvals.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与格鲁吉亚GNCC（格鲁吉亚国家通信委员会——国家电信监管机构）及GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚标准与计量研究院）要求的差距对照，涵盖《格鲁吉亚电子通信法》下的GNCC型号核准及合格认证、无线电设备及电磁兼容的GEOSTM（GS）标准合规、220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电气安全、当地进口商及授权经销商要求，以及《格鲁吉亚网络安全法》（2012年）和CERT.GOV.GE规定的格鲁吉亚网络安全义务。格鲁吉亚与欧盟签订了联系协议（DCFTA，2016年生效），推动监管向欧盟RED及EN/ETSI标准靠拢；但GNCC型号核准仍为独立国家程序，须在欧盟标准测试报告之外另行取得GNCC合格证书。格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员国。中国CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承认为GNCC核准的替代。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與喬治亞GNCC（喬治亞國家通信委員會——國家電信監管機構）及GEOSTM（喬治亞標準與計量研究院）要求的差距對照，涵蓋《喬治亞電子通信法》下的GNCC型號核准及合格認證、無線電設備及電磁相容的GEOSTM（GS）標準合規、220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電氣安全、當地進口商及授權經銷商要求，以及《喬治亞網路安全法》（2012年）和CERT.GOV.GE規定的喬治亞網路安全義務。喬治亞與歐盟簽訂了聯繫協議（DCFTA，2016年生效），推動監管向歐盟RED及EN/ETSI標準靠攏；但GNCC型號核准仍為獨立國家程序，須在歐盟標準測試報告之外另行取得GNCC合格證書。喬治亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員國。中國CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承認為GNCC核准的替代。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Georgia's regulatory frameworks for wireless devices are subject to change, and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (GNCC, GEOSTM, CERT.GOV.GE) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。格鲁吉亚无线设备监管框架可能有所变化，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（GNCC、GEOSTM、CERT.GOV.GE）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。喬治亞無線設備監管框架可能有所變化，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（GNCC、GEOSTM、CERT.GOV.GE）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Georgia require GNCC (Georgian National Communications Commission) type approval and a conformity certificate or registration for all radio and telecommunications terminal equipment under the Electronic Communications Law of Georgia. GEOSTM (Georgian Standards and Metrology Institute) GS standards — many adopted from ISO/IEC/ETSI and increasingly aligned with EU EN standards under the DCFTA Association Agreement — provide the technical basis for EMC and radio conformity assessment. Electrical safety testing for the 220 V/50 Hz European-plug (Type C/F) grid is required. A local importer or authorised distributor registered in Georgia is mandatory. Georgia is not an EAEU member and operates independently of EAC conformity marking; EU Association Agreement regulatory convergence with RED is underway but GNCC type approval remains a separate national process. Chinese CCC, SRRC, and CE documentation are not recognised and do not substitute for GNCC approvals. Cybersecurity obligations under the Georgia Cybersecurity Law (2012) and CERT.GOV.GE apply to connected devices.
answer_first.zh: 进入格鲁吉亚的无线设备须依据《格鲁吉亚电子通信法》取得GNCC（格鲁吉亚国家通信委员会）型号核准及合格证书或注册，适用于所有无线电及电信终端设备。GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚标准与计量研究院）GS标准——多参照ISO/IEC/ETSI制定，并依据DCFTA联系协议日益与欧盟EN标准接轨——为电磁兼容及无线电合格评定提供技术依据。需对应220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电网进行电气安全测试。须有在格鲁吉亚注册的当地进口商或授权经销商。格鲁吉亚不是EAEU成员国，独立于EAC合格标志体系运行；与EU RED的联系协议监管融合正在推进中，但GNCC型号核准仍为独立国家程序。中国CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承认，不可替代GNCC核准。联网设备须遵守《格鲁吉亚网络安全法》（2012年）和CERT.GOV.GE规定的网络安全义务。
answer_first.zht: 進入喬治亞的無線設備須依據《喬治亞電子通信法》取得GNCC（喬治亞國家通信委員會）型號核准及合格證書或登記，適用於所有無線電及電信終端設備。GEOSTM（喬治亞標準與計量研究院）GS標準——多參照ISO/IEC/ETSI制定，並依據DCFTA聯繫協議日益與歐盟EN標準接軌——為電磁相容及無線電合格評定提供技術依據。需對應220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電網進行電氣安全測試。須有在喬治亞登記的當地進口商或授權經銷商。喬治亞不是EAEU成員國，獨立於EAC合格標誌體系運行；與EU RED的聯繫協議監管融合正在推進中，但GNCC型號核准仍為獨立國家程序。中國CCC、SRRC及CE文件不被承認，不可替代GNCC核准。聯網設備須遵守《喬治亞網路安全法》（2012年）和CERT.GOV.GE規定的網路安全義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
